attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT,
 (
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT
 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_D_3B18_SHP_FRGT_CMB
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B18_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT.MESSAGE_3B18_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHP_FRGT_CMB)
